domain_actions.fs_read_file: Read text of a single file.
domain_actions.fs_write_file: Atomic write of a full file.
domain_actions.fs_delete: Safe deletion of a file or directory, with optional dry-run, glob pattern filtering, and backup-before-delete.

fs_zip.description: Compresses a target path into a standalone ZIP archive.

parameters.source: Path to the directory or file to compress.
parameters.output: The full destination path including the .zip extension.

fs_delete.description: Deletes a file or directory. Supports dry-run preview, glob pattern filtering within a directory, and optional backup-before-delete.

parameters.target: Path to the file or directory to delete.
parameters.pattern: (Optional) Glob pattern (e.g. '*.log') to filter files inside target directory.
parameters.backup_dir: (Optional) Path to copy the target into before deleting.
parameters.dry_run: (Optional flag) Preview deletions without making changes.
